Retina Resolution Prototype

VR display as clear as your eyes

Mark Zuckerberg's Post
Research Unity3D VR
  • Developed the software stack that spins up a series of internal retinal resolution VR headset prototypes with display correction and tracking solutions integrated
  • Built debugging tools to support firmware engineers validating and adjusting hardware
  • Designed and developed an interactive VR experience to show the benefit retina resolution VR can bring
  • Mark Zuckerberg posted about the experience on his public Facebook. The project helps define future VR roadmaps
© Yu-Jen Lin
